sql: SELECT id FROM customers WHERE region = 'US' OR region = 'CA'
SELECT id FROM customers WHERE (region = 'US' OR region = 'CA') AND status = 'ACTIVE'
SELECT id FROM customers WHERE region = 'US' OR (region = 'CA' OR region = 'MX')
SELECT id FROM customers WHERE (status = 'ACTIVE' AND tier = 'GOLD') OR region = 'CA'
SELECT id FROM customers WHERE NOT (region = 'US' OR region = 'CA')
SELECT id FROM customers WHERE deleted_at IS NULL OR status IS NOT NULL
SELECT customers.id FROM customers JOIN orders ON customers.id = orders.customer_id WHERE customers.region = 'US' OR orders.status = 'OPEN'
SELECT id FROM customers WHERE created_at < '2026-01-01' OR created_at >= '2026-06-01'
SELECT id FROM customers WHERE status = 'ACTIVE' OR region = 'US'
SELECT id FROM customers WHERE region = 'US' OR status = 'ACTIVE'
SELECT id FROM customers WHERE region = 'US' OR region = 'CA' AND status = 'ACTIVE'
SELECT id FROM customers WHERE (region = 'US' OR region = 'CA') AND status = 'ACTIVE'
